---
title: "Volkswagen AG Analysis"
subtitle: "*Global Business Environment*"
description: ""
categories: [Management, Year 1, unfinished]
date: '2022-11-15'
author: 
    - "Anne-Marie Adetunji"  
    - "Martinas Jucys Brady"  
    - "Jack Madden"
    - "Aaroh Bhargava" 
    - "Ciara Abragan"
bibliography: references.bib
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: right
    toc-title: "On this page"
    cite-method: citeproc

about:
  template: solana

---
